title: Wrap up for this week Trading ideas.
author: Magic-Mike-2023
selftext:
Hey everyone! Happy Friday. Even though today is a little rough day for market, this week looks pretty good in terms of performance. If you following my posts then you've seen a list of trading ideas that I've shared on [Tuesday](https://www.reddit.com/r/ai_trading/comments/1tutm86/trade_ideas_for_this_week/). So here is the results:

**Weekly Performance of top 7 stocks in my** [Cyclical Barbell](https://builder.limex.com/dashboard/104089) **strategy (June 1 – June 5, 2026)**

|Company|Symbol|Entry Target|Recent Price (June 5)|Performance Status|
|:-|:-|:-|:-|:-|
|Snap-on Incorporated|[NYSE:SNA](https://www.google.com/finance/beta/quote/SNA:NYSE)|$365.00|$378.55|Holding Above Target|
|Myers Industries, Inc.|[NYSE:MYE](https://www.google.com/finance/beta/quote/MYE:NYSE)|$22.50|$23.41|Holding Above Target|
|Baker Hughes Company|[NASDAQ:BKR](https://www.google.com/finance/beta/quote/BKR:NASDAQ)|$64.00|$62.73|Testing Entry Level|
|Avnet, Inc.|[NASDAQ:AVT](https://www.google.com/finance/beta/quote/AVT:NASDAQ)|$85.00|$86.94|Holding Above Target|
|AudioCodes Ltd.|[NASDAQ:AUDC](https://www.google.com/finance/beta/quote/AUDC:NASDAQ)|$9.50|$9.63|Holding Above Target|
|Karooooo Ltd.|[NASDAQ:KARO](https://www.google.com/finance/beta/quote/KARO:NASDAQ)|$46.50|$46.41|Testing Entry Level|
|Vale S.A.|[NYSE:VALE](https://www.google.com/finance/beta/quote/VALE:NYSE)|$15.50|$15.19|Testing Entry Level|

**Snap-on Incorporated (**[**NYSE:SNA**](https://www.google.com/finance/beta/quote/SNA:NYSE)**)** showed strength this week, closing Friday at $378.55. This move remains comfortably above our $365.00 entry target, supported by the company's consistent net profit margins and high EPS driven by professional tool demand.

**Myers Industries, Inc. (**[**NYSE:MYE**](https://www.google.com/finance/beta/quote/MYE:NYSE)**)** performed well, ending the week at $23.41. It continues to hold above the $22.50 entry point as the market reacts positively to its "Focused Transformation" and operational restructuring.

**Baker Hughes Company (**[**NASDAQ:BKR**](https://www.google.com/finance/beta/quote/BKR:NASDAQ)**)** faced some pressure toward the end of the week, closing at $62.73. While it has shown high free cash flow recently, it is currently testing our $64.00 entry level, likely sensitive to shifts in global energy CapEx.

**Avnet, Inc. (**[**NASDAQ:AVT**](https://www.google.com/finance/beta/quote/AVT:NASDAQ)**)** remained stable, closing at $86.94. This keeps it above the $85.00 benchmark, benefiting from its position as a key distributor in the electronics hardware sector.

**AudioCodes Ltd. (**[**NASDAQ:AUDC**](https://www.google.com/finance/beta/quote/AUDC:NASDAQ)**)** ended at $9.63, maintaining a slim margin above the $9.50 entry target. The stock's heavy R&D investment in cloud networking continues to be a core part of its growth reasoning despite the risk of enterprise tech cutbacks.

**Karooooo Ltd. (**[**NASDAQ:KARO**](https://www.google.com/finance/beta/quote/KARO:NASDAQ)**)** and **Vale S.A. (**[**NYSE:VALE**](https://www.google.com/finance/beta/quote/VALE:NYSE)**)** are both currently testing their entry levels, closing at $46.41 and $15.19 respectively. Both are sitting just below their initial targets ($46.50 and $15.50), with KARO's subscription growth and VALE's base metals transition remaining the key long-term drivers.

I'll post new ideas next week. Have a good weekend!
